name: openrouter-mcp
description: OpenRouter MCP: model discovery, image generation/editing, and image description.
long_description: A local MCP server for OpenRouter. Discover models and pricing (list_models), generate and edit images (generate_image / get_result), and caption or analyze images (describe_image), plus per-process usage stats. Image generation can also return results as inline image content blocks so clients that can't read the saved file off disk still display them.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List OpenRouter models with capabilities and pricing.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate or edit an image with an OpenRouter image model.

tools.name: get_result
tools.description: Fetch the status/result of an image generation job by task_id.

tools.name: describe_image
tools.description: Describe or answer a question about local image(s) with a vision model.

tools.name: get_usage_stats
tools.description: Report this process's image/describe spend and counts.

embed_images.title: Embed images inline
embed_images.description: Return generated images as inline image content blocks (base64) in addition to the saved file path. Keep on if the app can't read the saved file off disk; turn off for the leaner path-only response.
